falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above $12,500 (key resistance level from historical pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would invalidate the similarity to the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern, as the historical pattern failed to break above this level during its formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an aggressive intervention would introduce a new macroeconomic variable, disrupting the current pattern and rendering the UNKNOWN verdict obsolete.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
